frequency.example: The buses run at a high frequency.

freshman.example: He is a freshman at the university.

frost.example: Frost covered the window this morning.
The grass frosted over at night.

frown.example: She frowned at the bad news.
frown.example_zh: 聽到壞消息她皺起眉頭。

frustrate.example_zh: 慢吞吞的電腦讓他很受挫。

fulfill.example: He worked hard to fulfill his dream.

functional.example: The old machine is still functional.

furious.example: He was furious about the broken window.
furious.example_zh: 他對打破的窗戶大為光火。

furnish.example_zh: 他們為新公寓添置家具。

furnish.example: The library furnished us with books.

furthermore.example: It is cheap; furthermore, it is well made.
furthermore.example_zh: 它很便宜，而且做工精良。

gallery.example: We saw modern art at the gallery.
gallery.example_zh: 我們在畫廊看了現代藝術。

gaze.example: She gazed at the stars for a long time.

gaze.example_zh: 他感覺到她專注的目光。

gear.example: He changed the gear to go faster.

gender.example: The job is open to people of any gender.
gender.example_zh: 這份工作不分性別都可應徵。

gene.example: Eye color is decided by our genes.
gene.example_zh: 眼睛的顏色由我們的基因決定。

generation.example: Three generations live in this house.
generation.example_zh: 這棟房子裡住著三代人。

generosity.example_zh: 她的慷慨幫助了許多人。

genius.example: The young boy is a math genius.
genius.example_zh: 那個小男孩是數學天才。

genuine.example: She showed genuine concern for others.
genuine.example_zh: 她對別人表現出真誠的關心。

gifted.example: He is a gifted young pianist.
gifted.example_zh: 他是個有天賦的年輕鋼琴家。

gigantic.example: A gigantic wave hit the boat.
gigantic.example_zh: 一道巨浪打中了那艘船。

giggle.example: The girls giggled at the joke.
giggle.example_zh: 女孩們聽到笑話咯咯笑。

giggle.example: She let out a soft giggle.

ginger.example: She added ginger to the soup.

glimpse.example: I caught a glimpse of the star.
glimpse.example_zh: 我瞥見了那位明星一眼。

glimpse.example: She glimpsed him in the crowd.

globe.example: People around the globe watched the game.
globe.example_zh: 全球各地的人都觀看了這場比賽。

globe.example: She pointed to Japan on the globe.
globe.example_zh: 她在地球儀上指出日本。

glorious.example: It was a glorious sunny morning.
glorious.example_zh: 那是個陽光燦爛的早晨。

gown.example: She wore a long evening gown.

grace.example: They said grace before the meal.
grace.example_zh: 他們飯前做了謝飯禱告。

graceful.example: The swan looked graceful on the water.
graceful.example_zh: 天鵝在水面上顯得優雅。

gracious.example: Our host was warm and gracious.
gracious.example_zh: 我們的主人既熱情又親切。

graduation.example: Her family came to her graduation.
graduation.example_zh: 她的家人來參加她的畢業典禮。

grammar.example_zh: 良好的文法能讓文章清楚。

grammatical.example: Check your essay for grammatical errors.
grammatical.example_zh: 檢查你的作文有沒有文法錯誤。

graph.example: The graph shows the rise in temperature.
graph.example_zh: 這張圖表顯示氣溫的上升。

grateful.example: I am grateful for your kindness.

gratitude.example: She expressed her gratitude with a card.
gratitude.example_zh: 她用一張卡片表達謝意。

grave.example: They placed flowers on the grave.

greasy.example: The fried food was too greasy.

greeting.example: A smile is a friendly greeting.

grief.example: She was full of grief at the funeral.

grind.example: They grind the beans to make coffee.
grind.example_zh: 他們把豆子磨碎來煮咖啡。

guarantee.example: The store guarantees the product for a year.
The phone comes with a two-year guarantee.
guarantee.example_zh: 這支手機附有兩年保固。

guardian.example: Her aunt is her legal guardian.
guardian.example_zh: 她姑姑是她的法定監護人。

guilt.example: He felt guilt for telling a lie.

gulf.example: The boat sailed across the gulf.
There is a gulf between rich and poor.
gulf.example_zh: 貧富之間有著巨大的鴻溝。

habitual.example: He is a habitual early riser.

halt.example: The car came to a sudden halt.

handwriting.example: Her handwriting is neat and clear.

hardship.example: They faced many hardships during the war.
hardship.example_zh: 他們在戰爭期間面對許多困苦。

hardware.example: She bought nails at the hardware store.

harmony.example: The two families live in harmony.

harsh.example: The harsh winter killed many plants.
harsh.example_zh: 嚴酷的冬天凍死了許多植物。

haste.example: In his haste, he forgot his keys.
haste.example_zh: 他匆忙之中忘了帶鑰匙。

hasten.example: She hastened to finish the work.
